summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for ten listed PRs. No GitHub mutations planned except one security route and one conservative superseded close recommendation; merge, fix, and PR creation are blocked by job frontmatter.

Keep with its Microsoft Teams attachment-threading issue; merge and close are not appropriate in this plan-only inventory shard.

Already closed; mention only as historical fixed-by-candidate context.
Keep as related broad docs work needing maintainer review and check repair; no close or merge action is safe.
Independent maintainer-owned CI/snapshot repair; keep for normal maintainer review.
Keep as related draft work in the cron tool schema family; active author follow-up and draft state block closure.
Keep as related active provider-schema work awaiting maintainer review; no closure path is justified.
